untranslatable_reason: The EEDT pattern requires identifying two distinct peaks within a congestion zone that are 2-6 weeks apart, detecting the formation of a confirmation line between them, and confirming no third peak forms before breakdown. These structural pattern recognition tasks (peak detection, peak spacing validation, congestion zone identification, and confirmation line derivation) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires custom pattern recognition logic beyond univariate indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using close crossing below pivot (as proxy for confirmation line) combined with volume expansion, but this does not capture the essential twin-peak geometry and timing requirements of the EEDT pattern. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern detector.
